manifest.name: XDM protocol regression laboratory
manifest.description: Adds a deterministic loopback HTTP/TLS protocol laboratory, real download-engine regression coverage, and fixes the deferred desktop-productivity warnings.

commit.message: Add protocol regression laboratory and clean UX warnings

notes: Apply after the desktop productivity overlay.
All protocol servers are loopback-only, bounded, deterministic, and disposable.
Preserves reliable-transfer validation, transactional partial files, diagnostics, browser integration, media, queue, organization, and desktop-productivity behavior.
Uses real SocketsHttpHandler connections for protocol framing regressions.
Very-large-file scenarios remain logical and do not allocate payloads proportional to advertised length.

artifacts.commit_message: Add startup recovery coordinator and workbench

manifest.name: XDM startup recovery coordinator and workbench (fixed)
manifest.description: Adds bounded startup recovery classification, orphan artifact discovery, remote identity validation, and a dedicated recovery review screen; fixes build and analyzer compatibility.

commit.message: Add startup recovery coordinator and workbench

notes: Apply after commit b80102c or the protocol regression laboratory overlay.
Recovered active transfers remain paused until an explicit workbench action.
Artifact scanning is bounded to 4096 files and skips reparse points.
Remote identity validation is bounded to 15 seconds.
Uses xUnit v2-compatible cancellation tokens and imports DownloadRepairResult from XDM.DownloadEngine.

artifacts.commit_message: Add selective repair and complete checksum workflow

manifest.name: XDM selective repair and complete checksum workflow
manifest.description: Adds range-preserving repair, verified block manifests, independent SHA-256/SHA-512 state, verification progress, checksum import/copy actions, and separate destructive restart behavior.

commit.message: Add selective repair and complete checksum workflow

notes: Apply after commit 9ed4807.
Verify never performs a network request; selective repair requires HTTP range support.
A verified block manifest lets the first later repair request only locally changed or missing blocks.
Without an independent checksum, repair requires a strong ETag or Last-Modified validator.
Restart from zero remains a separate explicit destructive action.
The validation script touches all payload files to prevent stale incremental build outputs after rollback.

artifacts.commit_message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

manifest.name: XDM atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking
manifest.description: Adds staged atomic finalization recovery and durable shutdown tracking, with contained invalid-candidate recovery, pre-publication duplicate metadata, and ARM64-safe indexed history updates.

commit.message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

notes: Rebased against the exact xdm_repo.zip snapshot supplied by the user.
Requires the validated startup recovery and verify/repair checksum workflows present in that snapshot.
Contains invalid finalization candidates as recovery-required failures instead of aborting startup.
Publishes content identity before the first Completed snapshot and optimizes large-history indexed updates for ARM64 chroots.
The artifact refreshes payload timestamps before build to avoid stale incremental outputs.

artifacts.commit_message: Harden XDM Android backend ownership

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 6A ownership hardening
manifest.description: Hardens the Phase 5 ownership boundary before embedded aria2 and makes the mixed desktop/Android repository contract explicit: physical artifact identities, stable backend instances, process sessions, startup reconciliation, quarantine, and generation-safe adoption.

commit.message: Harden XDM Android backend ownership

notes: Declares Android as the explicit root project kind for the mixed desktop/Android repository; the artifact selects xdm_android for native validation.
Bumps XDM Android to 0.5.1-alpha01 and Room schema 5.
Legacy schema-v4 synthesized ownership records are preserved and quarantined rather than guessed into physical artifacts.
Paused and failed transfers retain ownership; completed and cancelled tasks clean backend artifacts before release.
aria2 remains disabled for production transfers until the next Phase 6 overlay.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android aria2 runtime foundation

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 6B aria2 runtime foundation
manifest.description: Adds the Android-safe embedded aria2 process boundary after Phase 6A: ARM64 native packaging, authenticated loopback JSON-RPC, private session storage, supervised lifecycle, diagnostics, and a deliberate production-task gate.

commit.message: Add XDM Android aria2 runtime foundation

notes: Requires the Phase 6A ownership-hardening overlay as its exact source baseline.
Bumps XDM Android to 0.6.0-alpha01.
Packages an optional ARM64 aria2 executable only as transfer-aria2/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a/libaria2c.so; no binary is included in this source overlay.
RPC binds to 127.0.0.1 with a random local port and per-installation secret; temporary secret configuration is removed after authenticated readiness or startup is aborted.
Production aria2 task creation remains gated until durable GID mapping, polling, and crash reconciliation are implemented.
The existing Android UI topography remains unchanged; runtime health is integrated into Diagnostics.

artifacts.commit_message: Complete XDM Android embedded aria2 backend

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 6C/6D final embedded aria2 backend
manifest.description: Completes XDM Android Phase 6 with operational GID-backed aria2 transfers, paused-until-owned activation, Room schema v6 mappings, process-death reconciliation, provisional completion handoff, and an attested ARM64 runtime packaging/release gate.

commit.message: Complete XDM Android embedded aria2 backend

notes: Requires the applied Phase 6B aria2 runtime foundation (user baseline commit 8eacb9c).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.6.0-beta01 and Room schema 6.
Creates aria2 GIDs paused, persists the source/destination/GID/ownership-generation mapping, durably attaches ownership, and only then activates network writes.
Implements add, pause, resume, cancel, remove, query, polling, session persistence, process-death reconciliation, orphan quarantine, and provisional completion handoff.
SAF destinations remain on the native backend until aria2 can write through XDM storage without bypassing the destination abstraction.

The third-party aria2 executable is not redistributed in this source overlay; the atomic installer fetches or accepts the official ARM64 archive, validates ELF64/AArch64 structure, records SHA-256 attestations, and release builds verify the exact APK payload.
No new top-level navigation route is added; diagnostics and backend status remain inside the existing Android topography contract.

commit.message: Complete XDM Android embedded aria2 backend

notes: Requires the applied Phase 6B aria2 runtime foundation (user baseline commit 8eacb9c).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.6.0-beta01 and Room schema 6.
Creates aria2 GIDs paused, persists the source/destination/GID/ownership-generation mapping, durably attaches ownership, and only then activates network writes.
Implements add, pause, resume, cancel, remove, query, polling, session persistence, process-death reconciliation, orphan quarantine, and provisional completion handoff.
SAF destinations remain on the native backend until aria2 can write through XDM storage without bypassing the destination abstraction.

The third-party aria2 executable is not redistributed in this source overlay; the atomic installer fetches or accepts the official ARM64 archive, validates ELF64/AArch64 structure, records SHA-256 attestations, and release builds verify the exact APK payload.
No new top-level navigation route is added; diagnostics and backend status remain inside the existing Android topography contract.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android backend strategy and migration

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 7 backend strategy, migration, and fallback
manifest.description: Adds explainable backend selection, pre-start fallback rules, capability comparison, persisted backend decisions, and journaled native/aria2 migration with transactional ownership transfer for XDM Android.

commit.message: Add XDM Android backend strategy and migration

notes: Requires the applied final Phase 6 aria2 backend baseline (user baseline commit 0f51a2a).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.7.0-alpha01 and Room schema 7.
Persists requested backend, selected backend reason, human-readable explanation, fallback eligibility, and migration journals.

Automatic selection compares backend capabilities, destination provider, protocol, mirrors, expiring URLs, media requests, selective repair, expected size, metered network, and historical throughput hints.
Fallback is allowed only before a backend task owns the destination; failures after task creation are recovery events, not silent engine switches.

Backend migration is journaled across source pause, inspection, target preparation, source retirement, ownership transfer, durable attachment, activation, completion, failure, and recovery-required stages.
Cross-backend partial reuse remains disabled; source artifacts are preserved and restart-from-zero is required when partial bytes are present.
No new top-level navigation route is added; backend comparison and migration history live inside Diagnostics and download actions to preserve the Android topography contract.

Fallback is allowed only before a backend task owns the destination; failures after task creation are recovery events, not silent engine switches.

Backend migration is journaled across source pause, inspection, target preparation, source retirement, ownership transfer, durable attachment, activation, completion, failure, and recovery-required stages.
Cross-backend partial reuse remains disabled; source artifacts are preserved and restart-from-zero is required when partial bytes are present.
No new top-level navigation route is added; backend comparison and migration history live inside Diagnostics and download actions to preserve the Android topography contract.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android checksum verification and repair

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 8 checksums, verification, and selective repair
manifest.description: Adds checksum expectations, persisted verification results, completion verification gates, trusted block manifests, and native selective repair planning for XDM Android.

commit.message: Add XDM Android checksum verification and repair

notes: Requires the applied Phase 7 backend strategy baseline (user baseline commit 6efc8bc).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.8.0-alpha01 and Room schema 8.
A registered SHA-256 or SHA-512 expectation must pass before a transfer reaches Completed.
aria2 completion remains provisional until XDM records verification results.
Trusted block manifests are recorded after successful verification and used to plan range-preserving native repairs.
Checksum and repair UI is folded into Add Download and existing download cards; no new top-level Android route is added.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android startup recovery and atomic finalization

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 9 startup recovery and atomic finalization
manifest.description: Adds startup recovery scanning, recovery actions, deterministic finalization journals, schema v9, and Recovery-screen actions for XDM Android.

commit.message: Add XDM Android startup recovery and atomic finalization

notes: Requires the applied Phase 8 checksum verification baseline (user baseline commit 74bba1d).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.9.0-alpha01 and Room schema 9.
Startup recovery scans interrupted downloads, ownership records, backend migrations, finalization journals, and app-private artifacts.
Recovered work remains paused until explicit user action in the existing Recovery route.
Finalization journals enforce Prepared -> VerificationComplete -> PromotionStarted -> DestinationStaged -> DestinationCommitted -> MetadataCommitted -> Completed.
No new top-level Android route is introduced.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android startup recovery and atomic finalization

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 9 startup recovery and atomic finalization
manifest.description: Adds startup recovery scanning, recovery actions, deterministic finalization journals, schema v9, and Recovery-screen actions for XDM Android.

commit.message: Add XDM Android startup recovery and atomic finalization

notes: Requires the applied Phase 8 checksum verification baseline (user baseline commit 74bba1d).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.9.0-alpha01 and Room schema 9.
Startup recovery scans interrupted downloads, ownership records, backend migrations, finalization journals, and app-private artifacts.
Recovered work remains paused until explicit user action in the existing Recovery route.
Finalization journals enforce Prepared -> VerificationComplete -> PromotionStarted -> DestinationStaged -> DestinationCommitted -> MetadataCommitted -> Completed.
No new top-level Android route is introduced.
Rebuilt to keep recovery and finalization entity converters in their dedicated store files only, avoiding duplicate Kotlin extension overloads in DownloadRepository.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android media capture intelligence

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 10 media capture intelligence
manifest.description: Adds media URL capture, metadata persistence, share intent wiring, real Media-route actions, schema v10, and media regression tests for XDM Android.

commit.message: Add XDM Android media capture intelligence

notes: Requires the applied Phase 9 startup recovery baseline (user baseline commit 350adaa).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.10.0-alpha01 and Room schema 10.
Uses existing Media route; no new top-level route is introduced.
Uses add inventory actions for new files and verifies every payload entry.
Keeps Room/entity converter ownership single-source to avoid duplicate Kotlin extension overloads.
Media tests use JUnit imports and are added to the devtool xdm_android test list.

artifacts.commit_message: Add XDM Android media resolution variants

manifest.name: XDM Android Phase 11 media resolution and variants
manifest.description: Adds persisted media variants, HLS/DASH resolution contracts, selected variant state, manifest refresh metadata, Media-route variant selection, schema v11, and regression coverage.

commit.message: Add XDM Android media resolution variants

notes: Requires the applied Phase 10 media capture baseline (user baseline commit 0b96953).
Bumps XDM Android to 0.11.0-alpha01 and Room schema 11.
Uses the existing Media route; no new top-level route is introduced.
Uses add inventory actions for new files and verifies every payload entry.
Patches Phase 10 validator to accept newer schema versions so cumulative validation remains green.
Media tests use JUnit imports and preserve zero-warning source conventions.
